scenarios.title: Aligned multi-timeframe trend still needs a setup

gherkin.given:
the primary, setup, and trigger roles all show a confirmed uptrend
And price is extended away from every governed support or value zone
gherkin.when: the overview evaluates the five gates
gherkin.then:
primary context passes
And location fails
And the UnifiedRead is NO EDGE rather than a bullish trigger

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-001 aligned trend without governed location remains no edge

scenarios.title: Five gates produce one explainable trigger

gherkin.given:
the exact SetupDefinition has a supported ValidationRecord
And primary context, regime, location, and closed-bar confirmation satisfy its rules
And the precommitted plan remains attractive after configured costs
gherkin.then:
the candidate is TRIGGERED
And trigger, invalidation, target path, gross and net reward-to-risk, strongest support, strongest contradiction, and setup expiry are visible

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-002 five mandatory gates produce one complete triggered read

scenarios.title: A failed mandatory gate cannot be outvoted

gherkin.given:
several moving averages and oscillators are bullish
And the significant setup structure has closed beyond its invalidation
gherkin.then:
the related indicators count within their declared families
And the invalidation gate fails
And the setup is INVALIDATED

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-003 structural invalidation defeats correlated bullish indicators

scenarios.title: Timeframe disagreement remains visible

gherkin.given:
the trigger role turns up
And the closed primary role remains a confirmed downtrend
gherkin.then:
the result states the timeframe conflict
And it does not call the primary trend reversed
And only setup families explicitly eligible for countertrend research may remain armed

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-004 tactical strength preserves primary downtrend conflict and eligibility

scenarios.title: Stock four-hour profile discloses session mismatch

gherkin.given: the selected stock trades a 390-minute core session
gherkin.when: the user selects the classic 4h/1d/1w profile
gherkin.then:
the product shows the included session and aggregation policy
And it identifies any unequal final segment
And the profile receives a distinct validation identity

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-005 stock four-hour profile exposes session remainder and variant identity

scenarios.title: Continuous-market four-hour profile is clean

gherkin.given: the selected instrument has a compatible near-continuous session contract
gherkin.then:
the trigger, setup, and primary roles are labeled with actual intervals and session boundaries
And no U.S. stock partial-session warning appears

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-006 continuous-market four-hour profile has equal session boundaries

scenarios.title: Open higher-timeframe bar is provisional

gherkin.given: the current weekly bar trades beyond a primary level but has not closed
gherkin.then:
the weekly evidence is provisional
And the confirmed primary state remains unchanged
And reload cannot rewrite the prior closed state as if the break had been known

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-007 provisional weekly break never rewrites confirmed history

scenarios.title: Wick through support is not institutional intent

gherkin.given: price trades below a governed support zone and closes back above it
gherkin.when: the failed-break model evaluates the bar
gherkin.then:
it may mark a spring-family candidate under the configured rule
And it reports the extreme, close, volume, context, and required confirmation
And it does not claim a stop hunt, liquidity sweep, institution, or motive

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-008 wick creates a failed-break candidate without actor or motive claims

scenarios.title: Volume confirms without identifying an actor

gherkin.given:
price closes beyond a structural boundary
And source-qualified relative volume exceeds the configured threshold
gherkin.then:
participation supports the breakout family
And the source, normalization window, and bar classification are visible
And no participant identity is inferred

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-009 breakout volume supports one proxy family without actor identity

scenarios.title: Indicator families prevent vote inflation

gherkin.given: SMA, EMA, MACD, RSI, and Bollinger-derived conditions are all positive
gherkin.then:
SMA and EMA variants remain in the trend family
And MACD and RSI remain in their declared momentum clusters
And the user can inspect raw methods without the raw count becoming confidence

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-010 correlated indicators count once and raw count is not confidence

scenarios.title: Range stays unresolved before confirmation

gherkin.given:
price has formed a mature range after a downtrend
And no configured spring, sign of strength, or confirmed range break has completed
gherkin.then:
accumulation remains a candidate hypothesis
And distribution and continuation contradictions remain visible
And the overview does not trigger a long setup

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-011 unresolved range preserves competing phase hypotheses and no long trigger

scenarios.title: Setup lifecycle does not skip armed state

gherkin.given:
all prerequisites and location rules for a trend-pullback setup pass
And the configured reclaim close has not occurred
gherkin.then:
its state is ARMED
And the exact trigger and expiry are visible
And no hypothetical entry is backdated to the pullback low

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-012 candidate becomes armed before trigger with no backdated entry

scenarios.title: Price-level confluence is not a liquidity heatmap

gherkin.given: a daily swing low, 50-day MA, and composite HVN lie within the configured volatility distance
gherkin.then:
each source and timeframe remains inspectable
And the zone is labeled historical level confluence
And it is not labeled resting liquidity or an order-book heatmap

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-013 confluence retains level provenance and never becomes a liquidity heatmap

scenarios.title: Comparison roles reveal relative weakness

gherkin.given:
the stock closes at a new setup high
And its sector ratio and peer percentile remain below their corresponding highs
gherkin.then:
market, sector, and peer outcomes are shown separately
And relative weakness is a contradiction
And the product does not generalize Dow's industrial/transport rule into an unsupported identical rule

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-014 market sector and peer roles expose relative weakness separately

scenarios.title: Option positioning is unavailable without a valid snapshot

gherkin.given: no current compatible option snapshot exists
gherkin.then:
the options module is UNAVAILABLE with the required source named
And zero gamma, no wall, or neutral dealer positioning is not inferred
And the price-based gates continue only if the SetupDefinition permits absent options

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-015 missing option snapshot stays unavailable and never becomes neutral gamma

scenarios.title: Dealer convention remains coherent

gherkin.given: a current option snapshot was computed under a declared dealer-sign convention
gherkin.when: option levels contribute to the overview
gherkin.then:
the flip, walls, net gamma scenario, and caveat use that same convention
And the consumer does not silently re-sign the snapshot

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-016 option flip walls and GEX preserve one inherited convention

scenarios.title: Footprint and depth modules fail honestly

gherkin.given: only bar OHLCV and an end-of-day option chain are available
gherkin.when: footprint and liquidity-depth evidence are requested
gherkin.then:
footprint states that tick-level bid/ask traded volume is required
And depth states that time-stamped full order-book data is required
And neither module emits a proxy result styled as the real feed

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-017 OHLCV leaves footprint depth and large-trade modules unavailable

scenarios.title: Gross and net expectancy stay separate

gherkin.given:
a validated setup has a stated win rate and payoff distribution
And the user supplies commissions, spread, slippage, and gap assumptions
gherkin.then:
gross and net expectancy are both shown
And breakeven win rate reflects the configured payoff and costs
And the product does not call gross reward-to-risk an edge

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-018 explicit costs separate gross and net expectancy and breakeven

scenarios.title: Inconsistent transcript arithmetic is rejected

gherkin.given: a user enters a 71 percent win rate, 6R average winner, and 1.8R average loser
gherkin.then:
it calculates positive gross expectancy under equal-risk assumptions
And it flags a claimed negative 50-trade total as inconsistent
And it names sizing, sequencing, costs, or transcription as required reconciliation inputs

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-019 expectancy audit computes 186.9R and rejects the claimed loss

scenarios.title: Custom parameters lose inherited validation

gherkin.given: the balanced breakout definition has a supported ValidationRecord
gherkin.when: the user changes its displacement, volume, persistence, or target rule
gherkin.then:
a new variant identity is created
And the prior validation remains attached only to the prior definition
And the custom result is descriptive-only until evaluated

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-020 changed setup parameters create descriptive-only identity without inherited passport

scenarios.title: Psychology guard blocks chasing without mind-reading

gherkin.given:
a setup triggered at a defined level
And current price has moved beyond the configured chase distance
gherkin.when: the process model evaluates a new hypothetical entry
gherkin.then:
it flags CHASE and blocks the original plan
And it explains changed reward-to-risk and invalidation distance
And it does not diagnose fear, greed, or the user's emotional state

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-021 chase distance blocks the frozen plan without diagnosing emotion

scenarios.title: No-trade day is a valid result

gherkin.given: trend, range, and reversal models each have unresolved contradictions
gherkin.when: the overview evaluates all eligible candidates
gherkin.then:
the UnifiedRead is NO EDGE or MIXED
And the strongest near-ready candidate and its missing condition may be shown
And no low-confidence directional signal is forced

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-022 unresolved candidates produce no edge or mixed without a weak signal

scenarios.title: Simple and Power cannot disagree

gherkin.given: a UnifiedRead has resolved for one stock and parameter identity
gherkin.when: the user switches between Simple and Power
gherkin.then:
direction, gate outcomes, setup state, trigger, invalidation, validation state, comparisons, and caveats remain identical
And changing display mode causes no refetch or private recomputation

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-023 Simple and Power preserve one result with zero display-mode requests
Regression: SCN-007-023 mobile keyboard tables and background-tab canvases remain equivalent
Regression: SCN-007-023 registration navigation and state-faithful owner publication stay in parity
Regression: SCN-007-023 imported labels stay text and sanitized export omits sensitive state

scenarios.title: Stale or daily-only evidence remains useful and honest

gherkin.given:
weekly and daily bars are current
And the tactical source is unavailable
gherkin.then:
daily swing models may produce a current WATCH or NO EDGE state
And tactical trigger models remain UNAVAILABLE
And the owner read preserves that limitation

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-024 daily-only read stays useful while tactical evidence remains unavailable

scenarios.title: Armed setup expires without a trigger

gherkin.given:
a setup is ARMED with a declared trigger window and expiry
And its exact closed-bar trigger never occurs
gherkin.then:
the candidate becomes EXPIRED with its unmet trigger named
And its original vintage, parameters, comparison set, gate outcomes, and expiry remain inspectable
And a later similar pattern creates a new candidate rather than reopening the expired one

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-025 armed setup expires immutably and a later pattern gets a new identity

scenarios.title: Completed evaluation is not an executed trade

gherkin.given:
a candidate became TRIGGERED under one frozen SetupDefinition and cost policy
And its target, invalidation, expiry, and evaluation horizon were fixed before the trigger
gherkin.when: the first terminal evaluation condition resolves
gherkin.then:
the candidate becomes COMPLETED-EVALUATION with gross and net hypothetical outcomes
And the outcome retains the as-of path and terminal reason
And the product does not claim that the user entered, exited, or realized the result

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-026 completed evaluation stays hypothetical with frozen terminal reason

scenarios.title: Candidate selection favors gate quality over direction

gherkin.given:
a bullish breakout, bearish failed-break, and two-sided mean-reversion candidate are simultaneously eligible
And their mandatory gates, validation quality, contradictions, and freshness differ
gherkin.when: the Overview Model selects one setup
gherkin.then:
it selects the candidate with the strongest complete gate and validation evidence rather than the most bullish score
And the non-selected candidates remain visible with their weaker or missing conditions
And evidence reused across candidates is counted once by family

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-027 candidate ranking favors complete evidence and keeps alternatives visible

scenarios.title: Comparison-set change creates a new variant

gherkin.given: a setup variant has a ValidationRecord for one confirmed market, sector, and peer set
gherkin.when: the user adds, removes, or reclassifies a comparison symbol
gherkin.then:
the new ComparisonSet shows its membership, rationale, classification source, as-of date, and eligible denominator
And a new variant identity is created
And the prior ValidationRecord remains attached only to the prior comparison policy

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-028 comparison membership change creates a new variant and preserves prior validation

scenarios.title: Invalid configuration preserves the last valid read

gherkin.given: one current UnifiedRead exists for a valid configuration
gherkin.when: the user enters an incompatible interval, threshold, or target rule
gherkin.then:
the new configuration is rejected with observed, required, and corrective action
And the last valid read remains visibly identified as the last valid result rather than recomputed under a fallback
And correcting the input recomputes the requested identity without a source refetch

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-029 invalid configuration preserves last valid identity and corrects without refetch
Regression: SCN-007-029 truth recovery preserves last valid identity across source and method failures

scenarios.title: Failed delta refresh does not erase cached truth

gherkin.given:
a source-qualified cached result and its exact age are available
And a missing or stale delta refresh fails
gherkin.when: the overview resolves after the failure
gherkin.then:
the last valid result remains visible with stale or partial status as applicable
And affected modules name the failed refresh and required source
And no cached value is relabeled current and no unavailable module becomes neutral

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-030 failed delta refresh preserves cached source-qualified truth

scenarios.title: Unreviewed transcript claim cannot enter the model

gherkin.given:
a transcript confidently states a universal win rate, hidden actor, or causal chart rule
And the assertion has no supported or bounded ledger verdict with an independent source or reproducible calculation
gherkin.then:
the assertion remains rejected and cannot affect a default, TechniqueResult, SetupDefinition, GateResult, or product copy
And the ledger names the evidence required for reconsideration
And repeated wording across transcripts does not count as independent support

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-031 ungrounded transcript claim stays rejected across model and copy

scenarios.title: Complete protected matrix remains executable

gherkin.given: Scopes 01 through 08 are complete with their exact scenario and contract tests
gherkin.when: the repository selftests, validators, page integrity checks, system-Chrome suites, and governance guards execute from the repository root
gherkin.then:
every SCN-007-001 through SCN-007-031 behavior has a persistent non-silent assertion and current evidence
And shared data, owner, validation, credential, registry, canvas, and prior-feature canaries retain their accepted behavior
And every discovered finding is fixed and the affected checks are rerun before completion

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-007-032 complete Feature 007 protected matrix remains executable
